title: The Guy in Charge of Chores with Low Self-Esteem Turned Out to Actually Possess Incredible Skills
overview: After he's fired from his party of heroes, the 15-year-old Kurt turns to a temp agency for work.

title: His First Atelier
overview: Kurt accepts an offer from Bandana to go work at his first Atelier, which harbors a dangerous secret.

title: What Mining Means To Him
overview: While Ophelia and the others discuss plans to uncover who cursed Liselotte, Kurt takes a job as a porter.

title: New Friends in a New Atelier
overview: Yulishia establishes a new atelier in the frontier town without letting Kurt know he's its atelier meister.

title: A Frontier Town With Enemies at All Sides
overview: Tristan & a demon lord force Marlefiss to summon hordes of monsters to attack the town in order to kill Lise.

title: The Ninth Direction
overview: Kurt tunnels into the ruins from underground and saves Marlefiss while his allies defeat the demon lord.

title: The New Papa of a Mysterious Egg
overview: After helping a village with a water shortage, Kurt receives an egg that hatches into a 3-year old girl.

title: Akuri's Fwoosh
overview: While Kurt and Yulishia help a farm with their pigs, a demon tries to take away Akuri.

title: Lise's Confession
overview: Mimico reports on Akuri and interrogates Solflare. Then Kurt & Lise go on a date before the rescue mission.

title: Yulishia's Date
overview: Yulishia's date with Kurt is ruined when thugs harass a local meat bun shop over a cooking competition.

title: The Margrave's Secret
overview: While the group distracts the Margrave, Akuri warps Kurt into the forbidden room hiding the Margrave's secret.

title: A Common Story About How the Former Head of Chores for a Party of Heroes Was Actually SSS-Rank in All Except Combat Skills
overview: The Margrave tries to summon a demon to save his daughter. After he fails, the mastermind summons it anyway.
